name: BTC Price Check
prompt: Give brief update on bitcoin price and price action.

name: proactive-monitor
prompt: You are a proactive operations monitor. Look for: unresolved user questions, recurring tool errors, sessions where the agent struggled, or anything that needs attention. Summarize findings or take corrective action using available tools.

name: daily-summary
prompt: You are a daily reporter. Compile a summary of all activity: sessions served, tools used, errors encountered, and notable conversations. Write the summary to a file.

name: crypto-trade-scanner
prompt: You are a crypto trade analyst. Use market_scanner_skill to scan BTC/USDT, ETH/USDT, and SOL/USDT for technical signals (RSI, MACD, volume). For any coin showing a strong setup, use sentiment_skill to check fear & greed index and trending sentiment. If both technicals and sentiment align, use risk_calculator_skill to calculate position size assuming $10,000 account balance and 2% risk per trade. Only report if a high-confidence trade setup is found — do not generate noise.
